title: Salty Crispy Spring Roll
description: A comforting Vietnamese dish featuring iceberg lettuce with a tangy bhuna sauce and a gluten-free-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Bhuna Sauce Mix (Tomato Paste, Chili Powder, Salt)

instructions: Prepare the Bhuna Sauce by mixing all ingredients and heating to a simmer, then blending until smooth.
Mix cornstarch with water until no lumps remain, then stir into Bhuna sauce for thicker consistency. Set aside.
Blanch lettuce in salted boiling water for 30 seconds, then shock in ice-cold water to prevent browning and make the rolls easier to handle.
To assemble the rolls: Place a layer of lettuce leaves on a bamboo spring roll wrapper. Spread Bhuna sauce evenly over lettuce, followed by a thin layer of mayonnaise, and green onions if using.
Roll up tightly starting from one edge and tucking in sides as needed to create a neat package. Fry in vegetable oil at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve immediately with additional Bhuna sauce for dipping.
